name: saleor-script
description: Script to apply basic structures in new Saleor instance.

scripts.seed:grupo-bet: npm run seed:attributes -- src/scripts/grupo-bet/attributes-export.json && npm run seed:productTypes -- src/scripts/grupo-bet/productTypes-export.json && npm run seed:categories -- src/scripts/grupo-bet/categories-subcategories-export.json && npm run seed -- --only=permissionGroups && npm run seed:manufacturers && npm run seed:products -- --count=50 && npm run seed:posts
